meaning: n.(西南非洲的)霍屯督人[语]adj.霍屯督人[语]的
examples: The Hottentot Venus was not a piece of art at all.
Late that afternoon, Jantje, the little Hottentot herd boy, came up to me and handed me a letter, which he said the English baas had left for me.
He had brought back much scientific information from South Africa, and many a charming evening we have spent together discussing the comparative anatomy of the Bushman and the Hottentot.
